speech:
Here are our operating hours: ⏰

**Regular Services:**
• Monday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
• Sunday: Closed (except emergencies)

**Emergency Breakdown Services:**
• Available 24/7, 365 days a year! 🚨

**Customer Support:**
• Phone: 9 AM - 6 PM (Mon-Sat)
• Email: 24/7 (response within 24 hours)

Individual mechanics may have their own availability which you can check on their profiles.
